COMMENT: 
Plans that use a coinsurance percentage amount rather than a co-payment amount will not have a 
value in this field; see instead the corresponding coinsurance variable called 
(PRE_ICL_MO_COINS_3M). 
Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The mail order pharmacies are 
currently referred to as standard
